AC-002.description: Detached groups show opacity-50 and data-detached attribute
AC-002.evidence: GroupManager.tsx applies cn('opacity-50') and data-detached='true' when detachedGroupIds.has(group.idStr). E2E test 'detached group shows opacity-50 and data-detached after identity switch' passes on chromium.

AC-003.description: Clicking detached group name does not select it
AC-003.evidence: onClick handler returns early (no onGroupSelect call) when isDetached. E2E test asserts no [data-column='open'] visible after clicking detached group name.

AC-004.description: Leave button works on detached groups
AC-004.evidence: Leave button unchanged for detached groups. Uses client.destroyGroup() for detached (local-only removal) vs client.leaveGroup() for active groups. E2E test 'leave button works on detached group' passes.

AC-012.description: Invite form hidden when selected group is detached
AC-012.evidence: Conditional render: selectedGroupId && !detachedGroupIds.has(selectedGroupId) gates the invite form section.

AC-013.description: Member list visible for detached groups
AC-013.evidence: Members section render condition unchanged — still shows when selectedGroupId && members.length > 0, regardless of detached state.

tests: detached group shows opacity-50 and data-detached after identity switch
leave button works on detached group

mobile_chrome.reason: Pre-existing mobile bunker auth infrastructure issue — same class of failure as other mobile E2E tests
